title: import_coincidence_matrix_v1 — manifest contract for the per-(interval pair) coincidence TSV
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_coincidence_matrix'. Reads a per-(chrom × interval_a × interval_b) coefficient-of-coincidence TSV and emits a staging_coincidence_matrix_v0 layer. Per SPEC_coincidence_matrix_adapter.md §3, the canonical column set is chrom, interval_a_id, interval_b_id, plus interval coords, r_a, r_b, r_ab, c_coincidence, and optional stratification (karyotype_at_focal_inv, focal_inversion_id).

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the coincidence_matrix TSV.

max_rows.description: Optional cap for very large fixtures.
